prompt: Hero raised and villain called. Who is more likely to continue pressure on the flop?
why_v1: The last aggressor usually keeps initiative and is more likely to continue pressure first.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Hero is more likely to keep pressure because hero raised last and has initiative.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Hero is more likely to continue pressure here because hero raised last.
recap_v1: The player who made the last aggressive action usually keeps initiative and is more likely to keep pressure on the next street.
